description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/core/sdk:3.0 Docker image and three stages: build, test, and publish, with a global variable project set to Immutability. In the build stage add a build job that sets build_path to $project, runs `cd $build_path`, then `dotnet add package Roslynator.Analyzers` and `dotnet build --no-incremental -v q /warnaserror`. In the test stage add a test job that sets test_path to $project.Tests, runs `cd $test_path` followed by `dotnet test`. In the publish stage add a publish job that runs only on the master branch, targets the production environment, sets build_path to $project, executes `cd $build_path`, `rm -rf bin`, `dotnet pack -v q /warnaserror -c Release`, changes to `bin/Release`, and pushes the generated *.nupkg to NuGet with `dotnet nuget push ./*.nupkg --source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json --api-key $NUGET`. No caches or artifacts are defined.
